retry_reason: Failure indicates the association was not found or its refcount was zero; retrying without new state (e.g., a newly arrived INIT) is unlikely to succeed.
contract_summary: This function is a get-wrapper that resolves an SCTP association from network addresses and returns it with an acquired reference. On success, the caller receives an association pointer with an elevated refcount and must later release it via sctp_association_put() or equivalent. On failure (NULL return), no reference is taken. The function may invoke lookup helpers that also acquire a reference on the transport output parameter. The debug prints are purely informational and do not affect refcount semantics.
